---
output:
  pagedown::html_paged:
    css:
      - default-page
      - default
      - ../shared/html/guide.css

params:
  table_path: "plantpestguide_content.csv"

  unit: "KLMN"
  image_col: "PNG_small"

  pest_col: "PEST"
  latin_col: "LATIN_FULL"
  description_col: "DESCRIPTION"

---

```{r include=FALSE}
library(dplyr) 
library(stringr) 
library(glue) 


unit <- params$unit 

host_col <- paste0(unit, "_knownhosts") 

pests_raw <- read.csv( params$table_path, stringsAsFactors = FALSE ) 
names(pests_raw) <- trimws(names(pests_raw)) 
names(pests_raw) <- gsub("\ufeff", "", names(pests_raw), fixed = TRUE) 
names(pests_raw) <- gsub(".", " ", names(pests_raw), fixed = TRUE) 


required_cols <- c( params$pest_col, 
                    params$latin_col, 
                    params$description_col, 
                    params$image_col, host_col, "HOSTS_ALL" ) 

missing_cols <- setdiff(required_cols, names(pests_raw)) 

if (length(missing_cols) > 0) { 
  stop( "Missing required column(s): ", 
        paste(missing_cols, collapse = ", ") ) 
  } 

pests <- pests_raw %>% 
  mutate( .known_hosts = as.character(.data[[host_col]]) ) %>% 
  filter(str_detect(.known_hosts, "[A-Za-z]")) %>% 
  arrange(.data[[params$pest_col]])
```

```{css,echo=F}


@page:first {
  margin: 0.2in;
  
  @top-left {
    content: none
  }
  
  @top-center {
    content: none;
  }

  @top-right {
    content: "Whitebark Pine Pest Guide";
    font-size: 11pt;
    white-space: nowrap;
  }

  @bottom-left {
    content: none;
  }

  @bottom-center {
    content: "(for more diagnostic tips and photos see the expanded guide)";
    font-size: 8pt;
    font-style: italic;
  }
  
  @bottom-right {
    content: none;
  }
}

@page {
  margin: 0.2in;
  
  @top-left {
    content: none
  }
  
  @top-center {
    content: none;
  }

  @top-right {
    content: "Whitebark Pine Pest Guide";
    font-size: 11pt;
    white-space: nowrap;
  }

  @bottom-left {
    content: none;
  }

  @bottom-center {
    content: "(for more diagnostic tips and photos see the expanded guide)";
    font-size: 8pt;
    font-style: italic;
  }
  
  @bottom-right {
    content: none;
  }
}


body { 
font-family: Arial, sans-serif; 
font-size: 10pt; } 

.pest-card { 
aligh-items:start;
display: grid; 
grid-template-columns: 50% 45%; 
column-gap: 0.25in; 
min-height: 1.6in; 
margin-bottom: 0.08in; 
break-inside: avoid; 
page-break-inside: avoid; } 

.pest-image {display:block;  width: 100%; max-height: 1.93in; object-fit: contain; margin: 0 !important; padding:0 !important } 
.pest-image-wrap {
  align-self: start;
  margin: 0 !important;
  padding: 0 !important;
}

.pest-name { font-size: 11pt; font-weight: bold; } 

.latin { font-style: italic; } .hosts { margin-top: 0.08in; font-size: 8pt; } 

.description { margin-top: 0.10in; font-size: 9pt; line-height: 1.2; } 

.page-break { break-after: page; page-break-after: always; }


/* force compliance with my fucking formatting rules oh my god! */
.pest-card .hosts {
  margin-top: 0 !important;
  margin-bottom: 0 !important;
}

.pest-card .description {
  margin-top: 4px !important;
  margin-bottom: 0 !important;
}

```

```{r render, results='asis', echo=FALSE}

for (i in seq_len(nrow(pests))) { 
  row <- pests[i, ] 
  
  pest <- row[[params$pest_col]] 
  latin <- row[[params$latin_col]] 
  description <- row[[params$description_col]] 
  
  known_hosts <- row[[host_col]] 
  all_hosts <- row[["HOSTS_ALL"]] 
  
  png_path <- row[[params$image_col]] 
  
  if (is.na(latin) || trimws(latin) == "") { latin <- "&nbsp;" } 
  
  cat(glue(" 
           <div class='pest-card'> 
           
           <div class='pest-image-wrap'><img class='pest-image' src='{png_path}'> </div> 
           
           <div> 
           <div class='pest-name'>{pest} <span class='latin'>({latin})</span></div>
           <div class='hosts'>Hosts: {known_hosts} (may occur on {all_hosts})</div>
           <div class='description'>{description}</div>
           </div>

           </div>
           
           ")) 
  
  if (i %% 5 == 0 && i < nrow(pests)) { 
    cat("<div class='page-break'></div>") 
  } 
}
```
